slots.description: Full property identifier as printed on the docx Objekt row.

strategies.description: UC Småhus tabular: row below 'Fastighetsbeteckning', expanded from CamelCase concat

strategies.name: fastighetsrapport_beteckning
strategies.description: Lantmäteriet Fastighetsrapport: row below 'Beteckning', uppercase fastighet block titlecased

slots.description: Property identifier without the parenthetical orgnr; used in running text.

strategies.name: derived_strip_orgnr_parens
strategies.description: Re-run the objekt chain and strip a trailing '(<digits>)' parenthetical

slots.description: Street + house number for the docx Adress line.

strategies.description: UC tabular: row below 'Adress' label, expanded from CamelCase, LGH suffix stripped

strategies.name: fastighetsrapport_adress_line
strategies.description: Lantmäteriet Fastighetsrapport: street prefix of the line under 'Adress' (before postnr)

strategies.name: lgh_adress_label_value
strategies.description: HSB lägenhetsförteckning: value of the 'Adress' label row

slots.description: Postort / locality for the docx Kommun line.

strategies.name: uc_postort_below_address
strategies.description: UC tabular: postort token on the row two-below 'Adress' (fallback for missing Kommun cell)

strategies.name: fastighetsrapport_locality_from_addr
strategies.description: Lantmäteriet Fastighetsrapport: locality after postnr on the line under 'Adress'

strategies.description: HSB lägenhetsförteckning: postort split from the line after 'Adress', titlecased

slots.description: Bostadsrätt / Friköpt / Tomträtt — drives the BR-vs-fastighet mode toggle.

strategies.description: UC tabular: row below 'Marknadsvärde' label, regrouped to Swedish thousands

strategies.name: prose_bedoms_till_x_kr
strategies.description: Fastighetsbyrån prose: 'Marknadsvärdet bedöms till X kr' regex amount

slots.description: Uncertainty interval (uppåt) printed as 'intervall om ± X kr'.

strategies.name: prose_symmetric_interval
strategies.description: Fastighetsbyrån prose: 'intervall om ± X kr' regex (uppåt = nedåt = X)

slots.description: Date this PDF was issued; routes to the matching template date slot via source_class.

strategies.name: uc_footer_iso_timestamp
strategies.description: UC footer: YYYY-MM-DD prefix of HH:MM timestamp on page 1

strategies.name: prose_dd_m_yyyy_stamp
strategies.description: Fastighetsbyrån prose: dd/m/yyyy stamp above 'Utfärdat av'

strategies.description: Lantmäteriet Fastighetsrapport: row below 'Aktualitetsdatum inskrivning' label

strategies.name: datavardering_fingerprint
strategies.description: VÄRDEUTLÅTANDE/Värderingsobjekt prose markers OR UC banner → 'datavardering'

slots.description: Hint for the docx template's BR-vs-Friköpt mode toggle: bostadsratt or fastighet.
